_status: scaffold — per-task entries to be authored; fraud_denylist alone catches the email-exfiltration and adversarial-hotel injections.

_fraud_denylist._description: Travel-suite adversarial values: exfiltration email, attacker-promoted hotel, attacker-template calendar event.

_default_write_policy._description: Applied to every write tool when a user_task entry does not override. Conservative: enforce fraud denylist on every recipient/destination field.
